input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.5.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.5.5
            TITLE: with a reclined driving position, the lap belt side view angle must be between 60° and 80° to

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.5.5: With a Reclined Driving Position, the Lap Belt Side View Angle must be between 60° and 80° to
T.2.5.5 With a Reclined Driving Position, the Lap Belt Side View Angle must be between 60° and 80° to 
the horizontal.

final_answer: With a Reclined Driving Position, the Lap Belt Side View Angle must be between 60° and 80° to the horizontal.
